metadata.title: HVAC Contracting & Energy Renovations in Uusimaa | Putkipalvelu J&V Oy
metadata.description: Ground source heat pump installations, district heating, pipeline renovations and HVAC maintenance in Uusimaa. Owner-operated, no middlemen. Call Janne — 045 359 9813.

common.name: Name
common.thankYouDesc: Janne will get back to you as soon as possible.

home.heroTitle: Energy renovations & heat pump installations in Uusimaa
home.heroSubtitle: Janne Kurki handles your HVAC work from start to finish — ground source heat pumps, district heating, pipeline renovations. One contact person, no surprises.
home.trust4Label: Janne handles it personally, start to finish
home.servicesSubtitle: We specialize in energy renovations and modern heating solutions.
home.howSubtitle: Four steps from inquiry to completed work.
home.howStep1Desc: Call or send a message — Janne responds personally.
home.howStep2Desc: We visit on-site to assess the scope of work. The assessment is free.
home.howStep3Desc: We agree on schedule and price. Work is done cleanly and on time.
home.howStep4Desc: We inspect the work together. No surprises on the invoice.
home.whySubtitle: Putkipalvelu J&V founder Janne Kurki handles HVAC work personally.
home.whyP1: I founded Putkipalvelu J&V in 2022 because I wanted to do HVAC work my way — honestly, on schedule, and without unnecessary bureaucracy.
home.whyP2: We specialize in energy renovations: ground source heat pumps, district heating, and pipeline renovations. When you call, you talk directly to me. When I arrive, you know who's coming.
home.ctaSubtitle: Call Janne — free assessment and quote. No obligation.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: We specialize in energy renovations and modern HVAC solutions in Uusimaa.

energiaremontti.title: Energy Renovations
energiaremontti.description: Comprehensive energy renovations to improve your property's energy efficiency and reduce heating costs. We plan and implement a solution tailored to your situation.

maalampo.title: Ground Source Heat Pumps
maalampo.description: Turnkey ground source heat pump installation — from drilling to commissioning. Ground source heat can reduce your heating costs by up to 70%. We also help with ARA subsidy applications.

kaukolampo.title: District Heating Packages
kaukolampo.description: District heating package installation and old system replacement. We handle the entire process with the energy company and ensure a smooth transition.

lviUrakointi.title: HVAC Contracting
lviUrakointi.description: Plumbing work for new builds and renovations. Water supply and heating pipes, sewers, underfloor heating — all HVAC installations from one source.

linjasaneeraus.title: Pipeline Renovations
linjasaneeraus.description: Pipeline renovations for housing associations. Water and sewer pipe renewal, heating system upgrades. We minimize disruption to residents.

lviHuolto.title: HVAC Maintenance
lviHuolto.description: Regular HVAC maintenance for properties and households. Preventive maintenance prevents faults and extends system lifespan.

jaahdytys.title: Cooling Systems
jaahdytys.description: Cooling system installation and maintenance. Air source heat pumps and centralized cooling solutions for residential and commercial properties.

aliurakointi.title: Subcontracting
aliurakointi.description: HVAC subcontracting services for construction companies. Flexibly and on schedule — tell us your needs, we'll handle the rest.

services.whyEnergyP1: Finland's building stock is aging and energy prices are rising. An energy renovation is an investment that pays for itself through reduced heating costs.
services.whyEnergyP2: Ground source heat can reduce heating costs by up to 70%. Switching to district heating eliminates worries about oil or electric heating prices. Both increase property value.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Putkipalvelu J&V Oy — owner-operated in Uusimaa.
about.introP1: I founded Putkipalvelu J&V in 2022. I wanted to do HVAC work the way I'd want it done for myself — straightforward, on schedule, and without unnecessary middlemen.
about.introP2: We specialize in energy renovations: ground source heat pump installations, district heating packages, and pipeline renovations. When you call us, you talk directly to me. When I arrive, you know who's coming. That's the advantage of a small company.
about.value1Desc: Janne handles the work from start to finish. You don't need to explain your situation again every time.
about.value2Desc: We tell you the price upfront and stick to it. No surprises on the invoice.
about.value3Desc: We don't try to be everything to everyone. We focus on what we do best — modern heating and energy solutions.
about.memberDesc: Putkipalvelu J&V Oy is a member of Rakennusvoima ry. Rakennusvoima is a Finnish construction industry association that promotes business conditions and expertise in the field.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Call, send a message, or request a quote — Janne responds personally.
contact.responseTime: Janne typically responds the same day.
